context: You can already say what you like. Now make it sound like real life by adding details: when, with whom, and how often.
explanation: Use one known sentence as the base - me gusta viajar - then add one detail from this block: los fines de semana or en verano. This small add-on pattern lets you say much more without learning many new words.

examples.en: I like to travel in summer
examples.note: en + time gives a natural time anchor.

examples.es: los fines de semana voy al gimnasio
examples.en: on weekends I go to the gym
examples.note: los fines de semana is a high-use routine chunk.

examples.es: normalmente viajo una vez al año
examples.en: I usually travel once a year
examples.note: una vez al año is a complete frequency chunk.

examples.es: a veces viajo con la familia
examples.note: You can swap con amigos / con la familia easily.
